title: Middle Eastern Steak Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish made with steak, mixed with creamy and eastern spices.

ingredients.name: Steak (1 lbs)
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality steak for best results

ingredients.name: Stir Fry Sauce (e.g. soy sauce, oyster sauce)

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and ginger and sauté for 1 minute.
Add steak and cook to desired level of doneness.
Remove steak from skillet and set aside.
Add Middle Eastern Spices and Stir Fry Sauce to skillet and stir to combine.
Return steak to skillet and toss with sauce.
Add raw almonds and fresh parsley and toss to combine.
